title: Shrimp's Distinct Potions
description: enhances all bottled beverages and gives each a unique texture!
body:
![cover](https://imgur.com/tDspmM0.png)
  
 ---

**Distinct Potions** gives a new more intuitive design to all bottles and potions
providing different textures for types and strengths of potions so they can
easely be distinguished at a glance.

### **IF USING SODIUM USE POLYTONE**
---

This resource pack can be used in **vanilla** although has some restrictions and is intended to be used and supports **optifine** or **polytone**
 
![comparison](https://imgur.com/bKRBq4h.png)
